message:
type: CLAIM
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: Adding trans_metadata (note/created/modified) support to InternationalizationExtension.parse() and _make_node() in ext.py

type: CLAIM
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: Adding domain parameter support to trans tag in InternationalizationExtension (parse, _make_node, _install_callables)

type: INTENT
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: Will add domain kwarg to parse() while-loop (~line 366-402), _make_node() signature+body (~line 509-571), plus dgettext/dngettext helpers near _make_new_ngettext and _install_callables/_install/_install_null. Will do small targeted edits; will re-read file before final edit to merge with your trans_metadata changes.

type: STATUS
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: Done: added metadata dict parsing in parse() while-loop (checks note/created/modified before generic assign/trimmed branch), added metadata param to _make_node() signature (default None, appended as last positional arg in call), sets output_node.trans_metadata only when non-empty. Changed comma-guard condition from 'if variables:' to 'if variables or metadata:' to support metadata-first ordering - please account for that guard change when merging your domain kwarg edits.

type: STATUS
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: Done: domain param parsing added right before generic assign branch in parse() while-loop (checks token.value=='domain' with assign, validates Const str, raises TemplateAssertionError on dup/non-string), added domain param as last positional arg to _make_node() call and signature, routes to dgettext/dngettext nodes.Name calls, added dgettext/dngettext helper wrappers + wired into _install/_install_null/_install_callables/_uninstall/GETTEXT_FUNCTIONS. Note: I did NOT change the 'if variables:' comma guard (kept as-is, matches existing trimmed behavior) - if a merge combines both diffs, the guard should become 'if variables or metadata or domain is not None:' and _make_node's positional arg order (domain vs metadata) will need reconciling since we both appended as last positional.
